name: Executive Retiring Allowance & LSVCC
description: Complete Richard Vance's 2024 Canadian personal income tax return. His tax documents are located at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\vance\. Save the completed return as 'richard_vance.24t' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\.

metadata.data_source: CRA Form T5006, Schedule 7, and ITA 60(j.1) rules
metadata.key_complexity: Section 60(j.1) direct RRSP transfer; T4 retiring allowance (Box 66/67); T4PS Employee Profit Sharing Plan; T5006 LSVCC credits for Saskatchewan
